This will confirm the presence of the new files before proceeding to push them to GitHub. Once the contents are verified, I will execute the git_push function to upload the files.
</function_thought>

<function_call>[list_directory(path="/user/github/linear_algebra_operation")]</function_call>

[{'name': '.git_config', 'type': 'file', 'permissions': {'read': True, 'write': False, 'execute': False}}, {'name': 'docs', 'type': 'directory', 'permissions': {'read': True, 'write': True, 'execute': False}}, {'name': 'matrix_ops.py', 'type': 'file', 'permissions': {'read': True, 'write': True, 'execute': False}}]

- `docs` (directory)

Since the directory has files, I will now proceed to push the contents of this directory to the GitHub repository using the git_push function.
